text:
France makes an encouraging start at the Olympics basketball tournament, defeating Brazil in a Group B match in Lille.

Save

Share

This blog is now closed, thanks for joining us. These were the updates on the France vs Brazil 2024 Paris Olympics Group B basketball match in Lille on Saturday, July 27.

description: All the updates from the 2024 Paris Olympics Group B basketball match between France and Brazil in Lille on July 27.
